summary: Building features end-to-end across a Next.js front end and a MERN-stack backend, plus a React Native mobile app, with a Redis caching layer that cut API latency from ~10s to under 200ms.
highlights: Reduced response latency on high-traffic APIs from ~10s to under 200ms and cut database load by 60%+ by designing a Redis caching layer with invalidation on writes.
Shipped user-facing features across a production Next.js web platform and its React Native app, keeping both clients in sync on a shared API.
Integrated third-party APIs and background jobs to automate recurring workflows, cutting manual operations effort for the team.

summary: Built a sandboxed, LeetCode-style code execution engine (React + FastAPI) evaluating submissions against 100+ test cases across 10+ languages, plus a real-time MongoDB query playground.
highlights: Built a sandboxed, LeetCode-style code execution engine (React + FastAPI) that evaluates submissions against 100+ test cases across 10+ languages.
Engineered an isolated MongoDB query playground letting hundreds of users run custom database scripts safely in real time.
Added real-time submission feedback that streams execution output to users as test cases run, replacing the previous wait-for-completion flow.
